a260721p1.summary: Ant International, an overseas affiliate of the Jack Ma-founded Chinese fintech firm Ant Group, has raised $1.2 billion in its latest equity fundraising as it seeks to expand.
a260721p1.title: Singapore-based Ant International, a payments company which spun out of Ant Group in 2024, raised $1.2B from investors including Ant Group and Alibaba (Reuters)

a260721p10.summary: The United States and China are planning to hold talks over AI in September, five sources familiar with the matter told Reuters …
a260721p10.title: Sources: the US and China plan to hold AI talks in September, likely before President Xi's visit to the US, a significant outcome of the Trump-Xi summit in May (Laurie Chen/Reuters)

a260721p11.summary: The global implications on the AI ecosystem. … Audio playback is not supported on your browser. Please upgrade.
a260721p11.title: Kimi K3 marks the arrival of frontier open-weight models; the core Kimi team has incredible culture and a freedom to express it within a GPU-limited environment (Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI)

a260721p12.summary: The AI Minister, Kanishka Narayan, will be given a seat at the top table of government but the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) has been scrapped.
a260721p12.title: UK PM Andy Burnham abolishes the Department for Science, Innovation, and Tech and elevates UK AI Minister Kanishka Narayan, who oversees AISI, to attend cabinet (Philippa Wain/BBC)

a260721p13.summary: One of the most important things happening on Earth today is the solar energy build-out. Around the world, companies and countries …
a260721p13.title: Gritt, which is developing an AI system that helps build infrastructure like solar panels, emerges from stealth with a $26M Series A and $34M in total funding (Tim Fernholz/TechCrunch)

a260721p14.summary: The IRGC claimed its cruise missiles destroyed Amazon's central data infrastructure in Bahrain and hit US air defence systems.
a260721p14.title: Iran's IRGC claims it targeted and "destroyed" Amazon's central data infrastructure in Bahrain using several cruise missiles; Amazon has not acknowledged it (Babak Kamiar/Euronews)

a260721p15.summary: Samsung Electronics Co. is rolling out a new AI-powered assistant that acts as a virtual health companion, joining a growing number …
a260721p15.title: Samsung plans to launch its AI-powered Samsung Health Assistant and new heart metrics tools like Vitals for overnight metric tracking in beta in August (Samantha Kelly/Bloomberg)

a260721p16.summary: ‘Multibillion-dollar’ pact will support Mistral data centers in Europe, helping the French company sell its AI models, and Microsoft its cloud and AI services
a260721p16.title: Microsoft and Mistral sign a multibillion-dollar deal to build European data centers and integrate Mistral models into Foundry, Copilot Studio, and Azure Local (Belle Lin/Wall Street Journal)

a260721p17.summary: Databricks cofounder Ion Stoica can explain what his latest startup does to a kindergartner on the fly.
a260721p17.title: Databricks co-founder Ion Stoica's GPU orchestration startup SkyPilot, which aims to be neutral across hardware and cloud vendors, raised a $20M seed led by Lux (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)

a260721p18.summary: OpenAI has seen a sharp uptick in demand for its artificial intelligence agents since its recent release of ChatGPT Work …
a260721p18.title: OpenAI says it now has 10M people using Codex and ChatGPT Work, nearly doubling usage from earlier this month when the company announced ChatGPT Work (Shirin Ghaffary/Bloomberg)

a260721p19.summary: Garmin Ltd. introduced a $200 screenless fitness tracker, becoming the latest company to enter a segment popularized by Whoop Inc.
a260721p19.title: Garmin launches the Cirqa Smart Band, a $200 screenless fitness tracker that monitors 80+ activities with an up to 10 day battery life, to compete with Whoop (Dana Wollman/Bloomberg)

a260721p2.summary: Sony Music Entertainment has filed a second copyright infringement lawsuit against Udio, asserting 30,117 sound recordings …
a260721p2.title: Sony Music files a second copyright suit against Udio, alleging the AI music company copied 30,117 recordings without permission to train its AI models (Murray Stassen/Music Business Worldwide)

a260721p20.summary: The agreement makes Fortinet the first cybersecurity vendor on Intel's manufacturing customer list.
a260721p20.title: Intel and Fortinet partner to co-develop the Fortinet Security Processor 6, making Fortinet the first named external customer for the Intel 4 process node (Luke James/Tom's Hardware)

a260721p21.summary: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on Tuesday said the Trump administration will look into whether Chinese artificial intelligence models …
a260721p21.title: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says the Trump administration is looking into Chinese AI models over distillation claims and it could "sanction them" (Ashley Capoot/CNBC)

a260721p22.summary: Mercor, a three-year-old data startup whose army of contractors teaches AI to give better answers, is growing fast but relies heavily …
a260721p22.title: Docs: AI data startup Mercor had $614M in gross revenue in H1 2026, up 70% from all of 2025, with ~91% from foundation model makers like OpenAI and Anthropic (The Information)

a260721p28.summary: Nvidia's Vera CPU is its first bid to become a key player in the data center CPU market. Although Grace has seen some success …
a260721p28.title: Nvidia details its Vera CPU for data centers, its first CPU with a custom core design, featuring 88 cores and 176 threads, set for general release in H2 2026 (Jake Roach/Tom's Hardware)

a260721p29.summary: Our newest Gemini models deliver the efficiency, latency, and reliability to build AI agents at scale.
a260721p29.title: Google launches Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber, and says it has started its "most ambitious pre-training run yet" for Gemini 4 (Tulsee Doshi/Google)

a260721p3.summary: Celebrating $100 million contributed by the community to the people who build and sustain open source every day.
a260721p3.title: GitHub says individuals and orgs have invested $100M+ in open source maintainers and projects via GitHub Sponsors since 2019, with $10M in the past five months (Stephanie Lincoln/The GitHub Blog)

a260721p30.summary: Alphabet is releasing three new Gemini models on Tuesday, including its clearest answer yet to Anthropic's lead in cybersecurity …
a260721p30.title: Google says Gemini 3.6 Flash delivers better coding, knowledge work, and multimodal performance while reducing output token usage by up to 17% vs. 3.5 Flash (MacKenzie Sigalos/CNBC)

a260721p31.summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman plans to brief the Trump administration and US lawmakers next week on the upcoming generation …
a260721p31.title: OpenAI executive Chris Lehane says Sam Altman plans to brief the Trump administration and US lawmakers next week on the company's upcoming generation of models (Maggie Eastland/Bloomberg)

a260721p32.summary: The research arm of the University of Tennessee has sued artificial-intelligence giant Anthropic in Delaware federal court …
a260721p32.title: University of Tennessee Research Foundation sues Anthropic in Delaware for allegedly infringing neural network patents, the first such case against Anthropic (Blake Brittain/Reuters)

a260721p33.summary: Meta has quietly released a new iPhone app that uses AI to create personalized children's stories, complete with illustrations, narration, and original music.
a260721p33.title: Meta quietly releases StoryKit, a new mobile app that uses AI to create personalized children's stories, including illustrations and original music, in Mexico (Zac Hall/9to5Mac)

a260721p34.summary: For a year, Apple knew that an issue in its Hide My Email feature was exposing customers' real email addresses.
a260721p34.title: Apple says it fixed a vulnerability in its Hide My Email tool that let anyone see a user's real email address; researchers first reported the issue in June 2025 (Joseph Cox/404 Media)

a260721p35.summary: Can you trust an AI model to do what you intended? This is a central question both for those deploying AI systems …
a260721p35.title: Analysis: every frontier AI model tested in cybersecurity evaluations attempted to "cheat", led by GPT-5.4 at 14.1% of tasks; Mythos cheated the least, at 7.8% (AI Security Institute)

a260721p36.summary: Meta's throwing Xbox cloud gaming Into Its Horizon Plus Quest subscription, and converting its controllers to work with it. — Editor at Large
a260721p36.title: Meta adds the Xbox Game Pass starter edition to its Horizon Plus plan, which costs $60/year or $8/month; the starter pass allows 10 hours of gaming per month (Scott Stein/CNET)

a260721p37.summary: OpenAI and Anthropic increased their federal lobbying spending to record levels in the second quarter of 2026 …
a260721p37.title: Federal lobbying disclosures: Anthropic spent $1.97M in Q2, up 26% QoQ, and OpenAI spent $1.2M, up 18%; Meta remained the largest spender at $5.99M, down 15% (Luke Fountain/CNBC)

a260721p38.summary: A 2023 software glitch at the state's Motor Vehicle Commission led to roughly 6,600 noncitizens being registered to vote during …
a260721p38.title: NJ Governor says a software error at DMV led to the improper voter registration of ~6,600 noncitizens between June 2023 and June 2024; 400 of those cast ballots (Tracey Tully/New York Times)

a260721p39.summary: Open Source, Decentralized Technology, Developers, AI, Technology — TODAY WE'RE RELEASING Buzz, A FREE …
a260721p39.title: Block launches Buzz, an open source collaboration workspace on Nostr protocol for humans and AI agents to share messages, code repositories, workflows, and more (Block)

a260721p40.summary: Building trust in the AI age — It's getting harder to tell what's real on the internet. — This is less true on Substack, and we aim to keep it that way.
a260721p40.title: Substack partners with AI-detection tool Pangram, allowing users to scan text longer than 100 words for an estimate of how much was written with AI assistance (Chris Best/The Substack Post)

a260721p41.summary: Users said the technology mistakenly deleted their accounts. To resolve the issue, they still had to rely on A.I.
a260721p41.title: Some Instagram and Facebook users say Meta's AI moderation deleted their accounts; Meta says AI makes 13% fewer errors and finds 10% more violations than humans (New York Times)

a260721p42.summary: Chinese open-source models like Kimi, Deepseek and Qwen are now dominant AI tools. American upstarts like Mira Murati's Thinking Machines …
a260721p42.title: Poolside launches Laguna S 2.1, an 118B open-weight model built for agentic coding and long-horizon work, that it says competes with larger open models (Iain Martin/Forbes)

a260721p8.summary: Meta also signs lease for a BlackRock-backed data-center project in Pennsylvania — BlackRock is leading a debt sale targeting …
a260721p8.title: Sources: BlackRock leads a $12B+ debt sale for Meta's new El Paso data center, as Meta signs a lease for a BlackRock-backed data-center project in Pennsylvania (Wall Street Journal)

a260721p9.summary: Members of the Army received an email informing them that they were rapidly depleting their AI tokens, and needed to limit use.
a260721p9.title: Memo: the Army CIO reinstates limits on Army members' AI token usage; docs show the DOD's Ask Sage tool can access 100M tokens via an annual "enterprise pack" (Vittoria Elliott/Wired)
